ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracts" (
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "tract_code" TEXT /* Census tract code */,
  "tract_name" TEXT /* Census tract name */,
  "sheets" INTEGER /* Number of sheets of data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the county where the tract is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state where the tract is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or metropolitan area where the tract is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the tract record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the tract record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parcels" (
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parcel */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract the parcel is in */,
  "parcel_code" TEXT /* Parcel code */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner of the parcel */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use category of the parcel */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning category of the parcel */,
  "year_acquired" INTEGER /* Year the parcel was acquired */,
  "parcel_address" TEXT /* Street address of the parcel */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the parcel is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the parcel is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the parcel */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the parcel's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the parcel's location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the parcel record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the parcel record was last updated */,
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the land_uses table */,
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the zoning_categories table */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the owners table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parcels_zoning_id FOREIGN KEY ("zoning_id") REFERENCES zoning_categories ("zoning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parcels_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parcels_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parcels_land_use_id FOREIGN KEY ("land_use_id") REFERENCES land_uses ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_uses" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use category */,
  "land_use_name" TEXT /* Name of the land use category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the land use record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the land use record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning_categories" (
  "zoning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning category */,
  "zoning_name" TEXT /* Name of the zoning category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the zoning category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the zoning category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zoning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the owner is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the owner is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the owner record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the owner record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical value record */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parcel */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the value was recorded */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the parcel */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the historical value record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the historical value record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_values_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census tract */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics were recorded */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density per square mile */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the demographic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the demographic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, planner, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parcel being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census tract the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market analysis, demographic report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "tract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census tract the visualization is about */,
  "viz_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., map, chart) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_tract_id FOREIGN KEY ("tract_id") REFERENCES tracts ("tract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parcel the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted market value */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES parcels ("parcel_id")
)
